mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (id, category_id, name, image, price,description, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, status) values (#{id},#{categoryId},#{name},#{image},#{price},#{description},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser},#{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from setmeal where id in
#{id}
